diagnoses.evidence_span: significant comorbidities including other frontotemporal dementia

diagnoses.evidence_span: atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries

diagnoses.evidence_span: patient experienced unspecified convulsions requiring management with antiepileptic therapy

diagnoses.evidence_span: ventilator-dependent given his advanced ALS with respiratory compromise

diagnoses.evidence_span: requiring long-term mechanical support through his established tracheostomy

diagnoses.evidence_span: Iron supplementation addressed anemia with ferrous sulfate

medications.evidence_span: Seizure activity occurred and was controlled with levetiracetam dosing
